title: AI-assisted real-time hemodialysis monitoring
titleZh: AI 輔助即時血液透析監測
story: A multi-wavelength optical system measures spent dialysate every minute and combines the signal with patient-specific variables to estimate toxin clearance during treatment.
storyZh: 多波長光學系統每分鐘量測透析廢液，並結合病人特徵，嘗試在療程進行中估測尿毒素清除。
outcome: From signal acquisition to interpretable, patient-aware decision support.
outcomeZh: 從訊號取得走向可解讀、具個人化脈絡的決策支援。

title: Flexible e-skin for physiological and animal-health monitoring
titleZh: 用於生理與動物健康監測的柔性電子皮膚
story: Flexible sensing, conductive textiles, low-power electronics, and self-powered concepts are being connected into practical devices that can move beyond one-time laboratory measurements.
storyZh: 柔性感測、導電紡織、低功耗電子與自供電概念正被整合為可走出單次實驗室量測的實用裝置。
outcome: A shared platform for human health, animal welfare, and field-ready sensing.
outcomeZh: 建立可延伸至人體健康、動物福祉與現場量測的共同平台。

title: Microfluidic gene/disease diagnostics & exosome preparation
titleZh: 微流體基因／疾病診斷平台與外泌體製備
story: Digital microfluidics uses programmed electrodes to move, mix, split, and meter tiny droplets. It creates a route from sample preparation and exosome handling to molecular assays with fewer manual steps.
storyZh: 數位微流體以可程式化電極移動、混合、分裂與定量微小液滴，串連樣品前處理、外泌體操作與分子檢測，減少人工步驟。
outcome: Programmable droplets for molecular diagnostics, exosome workflows, and parallel biochemical preparation.
outcomeZh: 以可程式化液滴支援分子診斷、外泌體流程與平行化生化前處理。
